title: ollama/ollama
summary: Fast, private LLM server that lets you run Llama 2, Code Llama, and other models locally via a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as standard LLM/Chat/Embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI frontend for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-npc
summary: Unity plugin that lets game developers run Ollama models for dynamic NPC dialogue.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET client for Ollama with full REST API coverage.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLMs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate for interacting with Ollama’s HTTP API, including async Tokio support.

title: ollama-powershell
summary: PowerShell module wrapping Ollama REST endpoints for Windows admins and automation.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack Bolt app that answers channel questions using any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing private Ollama completions to your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to MCP-enabled IDEs like Cursor.
